have h₁ : AnalyticOn ℂ (fun x : ℂ => (circleMap 0 1 x : ℂ)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        apply AnalyticOn.congr (analyticOn_id.comp (analyticOn_const) (by
          intro x
          simp [Complex.ext_iff]
          <;> norm_num
          <;> linarith [Real.pi_pos]))
        · intro x hx
          simp [Complex.ext_iff, circleMap, Complex.exp_re, Complex.exp_im, Real.cos_add, Real.sin_add]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp_all [Set.mem_Icc]
          <;> norm_num
          <;> linarith [Real.pi_pos]
        · intro x hx
          simp [Complex.ext_iff, circleMap, Complex.exp_re, Complex.exp_im, Real.cos_add, Real.sin_add]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp_all [Set.mem_Icc]
          <;> norm_num
          <;> linarith [Real.pi_pos]
      have h₂ : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℂ => (f (circleMap 0 r a) : ℂ)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        apply meromorphicOn_const
      exact h₂.sub h₁
    sorry
  · simp
    sorry

simp [Complex.ext_iff, Real.cos_zero, Real.sin_zero, mul_zero, add_zero]
    simp [h₁, h₃]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Real.cos_zero, Real.sin_zero, mul_zero, add_zero]
  rw [h₂]
  exact meromorphicOn_const
₁
